title: Smoke Toasted Aubergine
description: A festive Venezuelan dish featuring nutty and crunchy aubergine with a paleo-friendly twist.
instructions: Slice aubergine into rounds about 1 cm thick.
Season both sides with salt and pepper. Let sit for at least 20 minutes to draw out moisture.
In a pan, heat coconut oil over medium-high heat. Add aubergines and cook until golden brown on one side, flipping occasionally.
Once lightly fried, place in oven-safe dish lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle sea salt over aubergine slices. Using a disposable aluminum pan or metal grate, smoke them for about 10-15 minutes, depending on desired intensity.
